parameters.query: SELECT k.id, k.keyword, k.client_id, c.domain FROM keywords k JOIN clients c ON k.client_id = c.id WHERE k.is_tracked = true AND c.status = 'active' LIMIT 500

=UPDATE keywords SET previous_rank = current_rank, current_rank = {{$json.rank}}, ranking_url = '{{$json.url}}', best_rank = LEAST(COALESCE(best_rank, 999), COALESCE({{$json.rank}}, 999)), updated_at = now() WHERE id = '{{$json.keyword_id}}'

=INSERT INTO keyword_rank_history (keyword_id, rank, url, recorded_at) VALUES ('{{$json.keyword_id}}', {{$json.rank}}, '{{$json.url}}', CURRENT_DATE) ON CONFLICT (keyword_id, recorded_at) DO UPDATE SET rank = EXCLUDED.rank, url = EXCLUDED.url

=INSERT INTO agent_action_log (module, action_type, summary, status, triggered_by) VALUES ('intelligence', 'rank_check', 'Checked rank for "{{$json.keyword}}" - Position: {{$json.rank || "Not found"}}', 'success', 'n8n-rank-tracker')
